name: @flying-pillow/tower-terminal
description: Tower terminal surface for operating Mission repositories and missions

scripts.airport:status: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/tower-terminal && tsx src/index.ts airport:status
scripts.build: rm -rf build && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/tower-terminal && MISSION_GATE_ID=dashboard tsx src/index.ts
scripts.test:daemon-mission: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/tower-terminal && tsx src/scripts/daemonMissionSmokeTest.ts
scripts.test:workflow-e2e: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/tower-terminal && tsx src/scripts/daemonCurrentWorkflowE2eTest.ts
